flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Regis University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.6k → $46.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Regis University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.6k → $46.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Regis University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
